channel.title: Andy熱愛的新聞小知識
channel.description: 每日一則知識型話題，用聽的吸收最新資訊。科技趨勢、健康醫學、科普知識，通通在這裡。
channel.itunes:author: Julie Wang

item.title: EP1: 2026美國飲食指南爭議 — 為什麼營養學家說它錯了幾十年？
item.description: 2026年美國飲食指南引發爭議！心臟科醫生指出官方建議存在五大問題。從食物金字塔到最新指南，美國93%成年人代謝不健康，問題可能不在我們吃太多，而是政府告訴我們該吃的東西從根本上就錯了。
item.content:encoded:
2026年美國飲食指南引發爭議！心臟科醫生指出官方建議存在五大問題。從食物金字塔到最新指南，美國93%成年人代謝不健康，問題可能不在我們吃太多，而是政府告訴我們該吃的東西從根本上就錯了。

這集我們聊：美國飲食指南的歷史爭議、三項頂尖臨床試驗（PREDIMED、DIRECT、VIRTA）、2026指南的五個核心問題、以及你該如何避開官方指南的誤區。

item.title: EP2: The 2026 USDA Dietary Guidelines Controversy
item.description: A cardiologist's viral thread reveals why the USDA Dietary Guidelines may have been wrong for decades. 93% of American adults are metabolically unhealthy - maybe the problem isn't what we're eating too much of, but what the government told us to eat.
item.content:encoded:
A cardiologist's viral thread reveals why the USDA Dietary Guidelines may have been wrong for decades. 93% of American adults are metabolically unhealthy - maybe the problem isn't what we're eating too much of, but what the government told us to eat.

In this episode: the history of USDA guidelines, the PREDIMED/DIRECT/VIRTA trials, five core problems with the 2026 guidelines, and practical advice for healthier eating.

item.title: EP3: GLP-1 減肥藥的隱藏成本 — 你瘦了，但骨頭也瘦了嗎？
item.description: GLP-1 減肥藥（Ozempic、Wegovy）讓數百萬人成功瘦身，但 Wake Forest 大學最新研究警告——快速減重可能伴隨骨質流失。年長使用者、停經後女性風險更高。
item.content:encoded:
GLP-1 減肥藥（Ozempic、Wegovy）讓數百萬人成功瘦身，但 Wake Forest 大學最新研究警告——快速減重可能伴隨骨質流失。年長使用者、停經後女性風險更高。

這集我們聊：為什麼快速減重會傷害骨頭、Wake Forest 研究核心發現、高風險族群、以及如何在減重同時保護骨骼健康。

item.title: EP3 (English): The Hidden Cost of GLP-1 Drugs — Losing Weight, Losing Bone?
item.description: GLP-1 drugs (Ozempic, Wegovy) helped millions slim down, but Wake Forest research warns rapid weight loss may come with bone loss. Older users and post-menopausal women are at higher risk.
item.content:encoded: GLP-1 drugs (Ozempic, Wegovy) helped millions slim down, but Wake Forest research warns rapid weight loss may come with bone loss. Older users and post-menopausal women are at higher risk.

item.title: EP4: GPT-5.6 來了！OpenAI 最新模型如何用健康智能改變你的生活？
item.description: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.6 三款模型（Sol/Terra/Luna），分層定價、健康智能、Sol Ultra 破解 50 年數學難題。AI 從奢侈品變日用品。
item.content:encoded: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.6 三款模型（Sol/Terra/Luna），分層定價、健康智能、Sol Ultra 破解 50 年數學難題。AI 從奢侈品變日用品。

item.title: EP4 (English): GPT-5.6 Is Here! How OpenAI's New Models Reshape Your Life with Health Intelligence
item.description: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6 with three models (Sol/Terra/Luna), tiered pricing, Health Intelligence, and Sol Ultra cracking a 50-year math problem. AI goes from luxury to everyday tool.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6 with three models (Sol/Terra/Luna), tiered pricing, Health Intelligence, and Sol Ultra cracking a 50-year math problem. AI goes from luxury to everyday tool.

item.title: EP5: Apple 告 OpenAI 內幕有多勁爆？400名前員工、偷零件面試、後門入侵伺服器
item.description: Apple 正式起訴 OpenAI，指控系統性竊取硬體商業機密。超過 400 名前員工已在 OpenAI 工作，訴訟揭露令人難以置信的內幕。
item.content:encoded: Apple 正式起訴 OpenAI，指控系統性竊取硬體商業機密。超過 400 名前員工已在 OpenAI 工作，訴訟揭露令人難以置信的內幕。

item.title: EP5 (English): Inside Apple's Lawsuit Against OpenAI — 400 Ex-Employees, Stolen Parts, Backdoor Server Access
item.description: Apple sued OpenAI, accusing systematic theft of hardware trade secrets. Over 400 former Apple employees now work at OpenAI; the suit reveals jaw-dropping details.
item.content:encoded: Apple sued OpenAI, accusing systematic theft of hardware trade secrets. Over 400 former Apple employees now work at OpenAI; the suit reveals jaw-dropping details.

item.title: EP6: 骨頭也有荷爾蒙？科學家發現骨骼—血糖全新調控機制
item.description: 你的骨頭不只是支架——最新科學發現骨骼分泌骨鈣素，直接調控胰島素分泌和血糖代謝。骨質疏鬆和糖尿病的關聯比你想像的更近。
item.content:encoded: 你的骨頭不只是支架——最新科學發現骨骼分泌骨鈣素，直接調控胰島素分泌和血糖代謝。骨質疏鬆和糖尿病的關聯比你想像的更近。

item.title: EP6 (English): Your Bones Make Hormones? The Bone–Blood Sugar Control Link
item.description: New science shows your skeleton secretes osteocalcin, a hormone that directly regulates insulin secretion and blood-sugar metabolism. The link between osteoporosis and diabetes is closer than you think.
item.content:encoded: New science shows your skeleton secretes osteocalcin, a hormone that directly regulates insulin secretion and blood-sugar metabolism. The link between osteoporosis and diabetes is closer than you think.

item.title: EP7: 一個蛀牙如何影響你的心臟？根管治療能降低心臟病風險
item.description: King's College London 研究發現成功的根管治療能顯著改善血糖和膽固醇，降低心臟病風險。口腔健康比你想像的更影響全身。
item.content:encoded: King's College London 研究發現成功的根管治療能顯著改善血糖和膽固醇，降低心臟病風險。口腔健康比你想像的更影響全身。

item.title: EP7 (English): How a Cavity Affects Your Heart — Root Canal Lowers Heart Risk
item.description: King's College London found successful root canal treatment significantly improves blood sugar and cholesterol, lowering heart-disease risk. Oral health affects your whole body more than you think.
item.content:encoded: King's College London found successful root canal treatment significantly improves blood sugar and cholesterol, lowering heart-disease risk. Oral health affects your whole body more than you think.

item.title: EP8: 不再追求更大模型？2026年AI產業三大巨變，你跟上沒？
item.description: 2026年AI產業從追求最大模型，轉向最便宜、最適任務、最可控的系統。Perplexity執行長稱之為編排系統，中國模型用量暴增。
item.content:encoded: 2026年AI產業從追求最大模型，轉向最便宜、最適任務、最可控的系統。Perplexity執行長稱之為編排系統，中國模型用量暴增。

item.title: EP8 (English): Is the AI Race No Longer About Bigger Models?
item.description: In 2026 the AI race shifts from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems. Perplexity's CEO calls it the orchestration system; China's token usage surges.
item.content:encoded: In 2026 the AI race shifts from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems. Perplexity's CEO calls it the orchestration system; China's token usage surges.

item.title: EP9: 愛滋病可能被根治？CRISPR 基因編輯首次成功從細胞中剪出 HIV
item.description: 科學家首次用 CRISPR 從人類免疫細胞剪除 HIV 基因。EBT-101 在動物實驗病毒未復發，距離根治邁進一步。
item.content:encoded: 科學家首次用 CRISPR 從人類免疫細胞剪除 HIV 基因。EBT-101 在動物實驗病毒未復發，距離根治邁進一步。

item.title: EP9 (English): Could AIDS Finally Be Cured? CRISPR Cuts HIV Out of Cells
item.description: Scientists used CRISPR to cut HIV genes out of human immune cells for the first time. EBT-101 showed no viral rebound in animal studies.
item.content:encoded: Scientists used CRISPR to cut HIV genes out of human immune cells for the first time. EBT-101 showed no viral rebound in animal studies.

item.title: EP10: AI 科學家來了？《Science》發表通用型生物醫學 AI 代理，自動化研究流程
item.description: 《Science》發表能自主進行生物醫學研究的 AI 代理，從文獻調閱、提出假說到執行實驗貫穿整條流程。
item.content:encoded: 《Science》發表能自主進行生物醫學研究的 AI 代理，從文獻調閱、提出假說到執行實驗貫穿整條流程。

item.title: EP10 (English): Is the AI Scientist Here? Science Publishes a Generalist Biomedical Agent
item.description: Science published a peer-reviewed AI agent that autonomously runs the full biomedical research pipeline, from hypothesis to experiment.
item.content:encoded: Science published a peer-reviewed AI agent that autonomously runs the full biomedical research pipeline, from hypothesis to experiment.

item.title: EP11: 牛津用 AI 設計「萬能疫苗」進入人體試驗：我們離一針打遍所有病毒還有多遠？
item.description: 牛津大學用 AI 設計的萬能疫苗進入人體試驗，瞄準病毒幹部保守區，有望對付一大類病毒。
item.content:encoded: 牛津大學用 AI 設計的萬能疫苗進入人體試驗，瞄準病毒幹部保守區，有望對付一大類病毒。

item.title: EP11 (English): Oxford's AI-Designed "Universal Vaccine" Enters Human Trials
item.description: Oxford's AI-designed universal vaccine entered human trials, targeting the conserved stem region to fight a whole class of viruses.
item.content:encoded: Oxford's AI-designed universal vaccine entered human trials, targeting the conserved stem region to fight a whole class of viruses.
